workers.name: Bruno Manuel da Silva Neves (PFG PO CTC)
workers.comments: Bruno is an average technician but found himself well liked within the Arabelle team and is now a supervisor for these projects. Can be full of himself sometimes and has aspirations to be a superintendant. However needs testing on more demanding projects other than Arabelle. English is fluent. Seems to be doing a good job with project documentation. Needs to understand how to protect the team if we have issues
workers.oem_experience: ["Arabelle Solutions - ST","Arabelle Solutions - STV","Mitsubishi Power - GEN"]

workers.name: Juan Carlos Beltran Simarro (PFG SP)
workers.comments: Juan has lots of field service experience and is good all around and has good control of the team. Only needs to improve communications
workers.oem_experience: ["Arabelle Solutions - ST","GE Vernova - ST","GE Vernova - STV","Mitsubishi Power - STV","Siemens Energy - ST"]

workers.name: Hilario Manuel Pereira Ferreira (PFG PO)
workers.comments: Easily our best supervisor. Best for demanding projects. Controls the team well and always manages with the team he has. Always gets the best out of the team. English is avergane but no issues for work. Struggles only with project documentation but he is improving
workers.oem_experience: ["GE Vernova - ST","GE Vernova - STV","Mitsubishi Power - GT","Siemens Energy - ST"]

workers.name: Nuno Miguel Oliveira Guerreiro da Luz (PFG PO CTC)
workers.comments: Same as Bruno but has more experience as a supervisor. Technically he is good but lacks control of the team sometimes. Needs to be tested outside of Arabelle projects. Project documentation needs improving but it is getting better.
workers.oem_experience: ["Arabelle Solutions - ST","Arabelle Solutions - STV","Siemens Energy - ST"]

workers.name: Paulo Jorge da Silva Oliveira (PFG PO CTC)

workers.oem_experience: ["Arabelle Solutions - STV","Mitsubishi Power - GT","Siemens Energy - ST"]

workers.name: Rui Miguel Gamito dos Reis Torres (PFG PO CTC)

Him and Hilario worked well together in Tynagh as Rui helped with the paperwork etc and managing parts of the team. Rui can get emotional alot and he needs to be heard if hes having issues. He has previosuly mentioned problems at home and might leave.
workers.oem_experience: ["Arabelle Solutions - STV","GE Vernova - ST","Mitsubishi Power - GEN","Siemens Energy - ST"]

workers.name: Fernando Augusto Correia Soares (PO)

workers.name: Joaquim Manuel Leite Maia (PFG PO)

workers.name: Paulo Alexandre Da Silva Bento (PO)

Him and Hilario both work well together on demanding projects such as GE. One of our critical supervisors. Good attitude and control of the team. He understands the need to protect the team

Perhaps Tech 3 from Ivan's feedback
